name: Key Remapper
description: Press one key to automatically press another, with optional controls for levels, the editor, and menus.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Turn the remap on or off without clearing your keys.

output-key.name: Also Presses
output-key.description: The key that gets pressed (and released) together with the trigger key.

scope-gameplay.name: Active in Levels
scope-gameplay.description: Whether the remap works while playing or practicing a level.

scope-editor.name: Active in Editor
scope-editor.description: Whether the remap works in the level editor.

scope-menus.name: Active in Menus
scope-menus.description: Whether the remap works everywhere else (menus, etc).

show-indicator.name: Show Indicator
show-indicator.description: Show the on-screen binding indicator while playing a level.

indicator-x.name: Indicator X
indicator-x.description: Horizontal position of the on-screen binding indicator, in levels.

indicator-y.name: Indicator Y
indicator-y.description: Vertical position of the on-screen binding indicator, in levels.
